description: High-level architecture patterns for Architect Console dropdowns. Loaded on first boot when scope=GLOBAL is empty for this category.

entries.name: Modular Monolith
entries.description: Single deployable with clear module boundaries; simplest ops, refactorable later.

entries.name: Microservices
entries.description: Independently deployable services; autonomy at the cost of operational complexity.

entries.name: Event-Driven
entries.description: Services coordinate via events on a broker; decoupled, eventually consistent.
